heading: Judicial review
label: 4583 Judicial review
notes: Amendments2008— substituted “Director” for “Secretary” wherever appearing.Pub. L. 110–289
amendments: Amendments2008— substituted “Director” for “Secretary” wherever appearing.Pub. L. 110–289

children.heading: Commencement
children.label: a Commencement
children.text: An enterprise that is a party to a proceeding under section 4581 or 4585 of this title may obtain review of any final order issued under such section by filing in the United States Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuit, within 30 days after the date of service of such order, a written petition praying that the order of the Director be modified, terminated, or set aside. The clerk of the court shall transmit a copy of the petition to the Director.

children.heading: Filing of record
children.label: b Filing of record
children.text: Upon receiving a copy of a petition, the Director shall file in the court the record in the proceeding, as provided in .section 2112 of title 28

children.heading: Jurisdiction
children.label: c Jurisdiction
children.text: Upon the filing of a petition, such court shall have jurisdiction, which upon the filing of the record by the Director shall (except as provided in the last sentence of ) be exclusive, to affirm, modify, terminate, or set aside, in whole or in part, the order of the Director.section 4582(b)(2) of this title

children.heading: Review
children.label: d Review
children.text: Review of such proceedings shall be governed by chapter 7 of title 5.

children.heading: Order to pay penalty
children.label: e Order to pay penalty
children.text: Such court shall have the authority in any such review to order payment of any penalty imposed by the Director under this subpart.

children.heading: No automatic stay
children.label: f No automatic stay
children.text: The commencement of proceedings for judicial review under this section shall not, unless specifically ordered by the court, operate as a stay of any order issued by the Director.
